channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Estonia images show machine guns on Russian LNG carrier in Baltic  Reuters

  3. Armed Russian tanker with machine guns reportedly spotted in Gulf of Finland  Українська правда
  4. Russian gas tanker fitted with guns in ‘warning to Nato’  The Times
  5. Russia installs heavy machine guns on “shadow fleet” vessel for the first time, Dossier Center reports  theins.press

item.title: Iran hasn’t received $6B in frozen funds — and won’t until Tehran meets ‘milestones,’ US official tells The Post - New York Post
item.description:
1. Iran hasn’t received $6B in frozen funds — and won’t until Tehran meets ‘milestones,’ US official tells The Post  New York Post
  2. Live updates • Iran says U.S., Tehran to establish mechanism to monitor violations of deal  Haaretz
  3. US-Iran talks over $6bn Iranian assets to restart  The Guardian
  4. Iran says frozen $6bn will soon be returned as part of peace deal  The Telegraph
  5. Iran says $6B in assets to be released, fact checking Trump’s claims on birthright citizenship  AP News

item.title: 2 IRGC members shot dead at home in Iran, in what state media calls ‘terrorism’ - The Times of Israel
item.description:
1. 2 IRGC members shot dead at home in Iran, in what state media calls ‘terrorism’  The Times of Israel

  5. Death toll from Baneh checkpoint clash rises to three  ڕێکخراوی مافی مرۆڤی هەنگاو

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Russia approved secret China military training at top level, sources say - Reuters
item.description:
1. EXCLUSIVE: Russia approved secret China military training at top level, sources say  Reuters

item.title: Mexican vigilante, the ‘Batman,’ wanted by police: Report - NewsNation

item.title: Putin knows he’s in trouble. It’s time to kick him while he’s down - The Independent
item.description:
1. Putin knows he’s in trouble. It’s time to kick him while he’s down  The Independent
  2. Ukraine’s Plan to Unnerve Putin  The Atlantic
  3. Ukraine Takes the War to Russia  The New York Times
  4. Ukraine has brought the (drone) war to Russia. But it may prolong the fighting.  The Christian Science Monitor
  5. Ukraine’s Expanding Strike Campaign Undercuts Putin’s Claims of Steady Progress  The Jamestown Foundation
